MSRules.GeneralRules1: Mystical Spirits is a 6-reel, 5-rows video slot featuring symbols collection with win multipliers.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{400} - %{15625} ways, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 3,600 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

MSRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

MSCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
MSCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
MSCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Free Spins symbol) may occupy 2 to 3 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
MSCommonRules.WildsExplaination2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Free Spins symbol.
MSCommonRules.WildsExplaination3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.

MSMultiplier.Title: Multiplier
MSMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination1: At the start of any spin, the Red multiplier, Blue Multiplier and Green Multiplier below the reels are set as x1.
MSMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination2: All wins will be multiplied by the value equal to the multiplication of all 3 multiplier values.
MSMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination3: After wins are paid, all winning symbols will be collected in the multiplier collection slots below the reels.
MSMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination4: All winning Red Spirit symbol, Fire symbol and/or Ace symbol will be collected in the Red multiplier collection slots.
MSMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination5: All winning Blue Spirit symbol, Water symbol and/or King symbol will be collected in the Blue multiplier collection slots.
MSMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination6: All winning Green Spirit symbol, Leaf symbol and/or Queen symbol will be collected in the Green multiplier collection slots.
MSMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination7: All winning Wild symbol will be collected in all 3 multiplier collection slots.
MSMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination8: Any multiplier collection slots with 5 collected winning symbols will increase the respective multiplier value by 1.

MSFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
MSFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 4 Free Spins symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 12 free spins. Each additional Free Spins symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
MSFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: At the start of any free spin, the Red multiplier, Blue Multiplier and Green Multiplier below the reels are set as x2.

MSMaximumWin.Title: Maximum Win
MSMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
MSMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
